benefits.description: Stomach pain resolved, GI issues improved, stomach lining healing
Intense hunger induced, ability to eat full nutritious meals consistently
Improved blood flow to GI tract through consistent eating and exercise

side_effects.description: Extreme hunger during first BPC-157 vial only; hunger disappeared when stomach pain returned
PPIs made issues worse; daily diarrhea from Vyvanse initially

protocol_notes: BPC-157 first vial produced significant improvement in stomach pain and induced extreme hunger. Second vial of BPC-157 produced no effect. Theorized that hunger induction itself was the key therapeutic mechanism. GHRP-6 dosed at 4-6 units (100-150mcg) on insulin syringe sublingually each evening after 2-3 hour fast, waited 30-50min before eating large meals. Over 4 weeks on GHRP-6, stomach stretched out and user remained hungry all day. No body fat gain noticed over 4 weeks despite increased food intake and daily exercise. User attributes original GI damage to years of high-dose Vyvanse (ADHD medication), chronic stress, daily NSAIDs, frequent skipped meals, and nightly alcohol use. Root cause identified as vascular insufficiency and vasoconstrictive state from sympathetic nervous system dysregulation. Clonidine used to manage sympathetic response to Vyvanse. User notes BPC-157 blunted stimulant effects.
